movie.title: Love Mocktail (2020) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Kannada] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDrive | BSub
movie.synopsis: Love Mocktail is a 2020 Indian Kannada-language romantic drama film directed by Krishna in his director debut and jointly produced by Krishna, Milana Nagaraj. The film stars Krishna, Milana Nagaraj in the lead roles. The film was released on 31 January 2020.
